title: Workflow for Effective Matplotlib Plotting
description: A flowchart illustrating the recommended process and key tips for creating clear and customizable plots using Matplotlib during Exploratory Data Analysis.
elements: Plot Data on Axes (ax.plot(), ax.scatter(), etc.)
relationships: Sequential workflow from setup to display, with an iterative feedback loop from 'Refine & Tweak' back to 'Customize Plot' for adjustments.
